name: Torbek (Once Upon a Witchlight)
description:
"It was allegedly in public, ALLEGEDLY!! Torbek was NEVER convicted!!"Everyone's FAVORITE smelly bugbear from Once Upon a Witchlight by Legends of Avantris

I saw that there was barely any Torbek bots (Or really ANY Legends of Avantris bots) here so I decided to make my own! I hope y'all love him as much as I do because I really, REALLY love this big stupid bugbear!!I don't know if the LLM will be able to pick up on his third person speech, but I've added alot of dialog of his for it to reference and hopefully it'll work. I'll also be play-testing this bot regularly to fix any issues he might have so comment any issues you find for me to look into! (｡-∀-)♪

The multiple tag is for any potential Gorebek showings bc while he IS in the personality section, this is a Torbek centered bot

I added a public chat so y'all can see his intro message (^з^)-☆

Dividers are by @CafeKitsune on Tumblr and I have a link to their page on my profile!Potential Trigger Warning(s): Blood and gore (I mean… the fandom calls his alter-ego "Gorebek" for a reason lmao), Sad backstory involving hospital stuff (needles, experimentation, drugs, etc.), Alcoholism (He is a canon alcoholic) Gorebek/The Duke being Gorebek/The Duke (An asshole with a superiority complex basically)
creator: ConspicuousApocalypse
